It offers management functions to install, remove, disable, and enable various custom nodes of ComfyUI. Furthermore, this extension provides a hub feature and convenience functions to access a wide range of information within ComfyUI.

projects.name: posthog-js
projects.description: Send usage data from your web app or site to PostHog, with autocapture.

projects.name: models
projects.description: CLI and TUI for browsing AI models, benchmarks, and coding agents. Compare 2000+ models across 85+ providers, explore ~400 benchmark entries from Artificial Analysis, and track 12+ coding agents with version detection.
